item_name: INTERCOMPANY INCOME

item_name: CASH DIVIDENDS DECLARED ON PREFERRED STOCK

Excludes dividends declared during the previous calendar year but paid in the current period. A liability for dividends payable may not be accrued in advance of the formal declaration of a dividend by the boards of directors. However; the nonbank subsidiary may segregate a portion of retained ea

item_name: SECOND TEXT OF NOTES TO ITEMS ON THE FINANCIAL STATEMENTS

It should be used in conjunction with the value reported in BHCCB068. NOTE: Reported on Notes to the Financial Statements for the FR Y-11I(BHCC) report.

item_name: CASH DIVIDENDS DECLARED ON COMMON STOCK

item_name: LIMITED-LIFE PREFERRED STOCK AND RELATED SURPLUS

item_name: INCOME EARNED BUT NOT COLLECTED
description: Includes the amount of interest; commissions; and other income earned or accrued on loans; securities; and other assets and applicable to current or prior periods that has not yet been collected. NOTE: Reported on the Balance Sheet for the FR Y-11Q (BHCS) report.

item_name: ASSETS HELD IN TRADING ACCOUNTS - SECURITIES OF U.S. GOVERNMENT AND ITS AGENCIES
description: Includes the total value of securities issued by the U.S. Government and all other U.S. Government agencies and official institutions thereof. NOTE: Beginning 12/31/02; reported on Schedule BS-M for the FR 2314 (SUBC) report.

item_name: ASSETS HELD IN TRADING ACCOUNTS - SECURITIES OF ALL FOREIGN GOVERNMENTS AND OFFICIAL INSTITUTIONS
description: Includes the appropriate value of all debt securities issued by foreign governments (central; state; provincial and local); including their ministries; departments and agencies. item_name: ASSETS HELD IN TRADING ACCOUNTS - EQUITY SECURITIES
description: Includes the appropriate value of all equity securities held in the organization's trading account. Excludes equity securities which have been purchased for investment or acquired for debts previously contracted. NOTE: Beginning 12/31/02; reported on Schedule BS-M for the FR 2314 (SUBC) report.

item_name: ASSETS HELD IN TRADING ACCOUNTS - CORPORATE BONDS; NOTES AND DEBENTURES
description: Includes the total value of debt securities issued by corporations. NOTE: Beginning 12/31/02; reported on Schedule BS-M for the FR 2314 (SUBC) report.

item_name: ASSETS HELD IN TRADING ACCOUNTS - OTHER ASSETS (INCLUDING COMMERCIAL PAPER)

Also included are certificates of deposit; bankers acceptances and commercial paper. NOTE: Beginning 12/31/02; reported on Schedule BS-M for the FR 2314 (SUBC) report.

Excludes commercial paper issued by the combined nonbank subsidiaries; which is reported in item 2309. Also excludes all borrowings with related institutions. Included are future and forward interest rate contracts (e.g.; U.S. Treasury securities futures; forward rate agreements and forward agreements on U.S. government securities) and future and forward contracts on other commodities; (e.g.; stock index and commodity contracts). description: Includes all other loans held by the nonbank subsidiary that are not properly included in items 1410; 3623; 3622; and 1975 (items M1 through M4 on the report form for the FR Y-11Q or items 1 through 4 on the report form for the FR Y-11I) and all lease financing receivables. Also includes all outstanding receivable balances relating to direct financing and leverage leases on property acquired by the nonbank subsidiary for leasing purposes. These balances should include the estimated residual valu

item_name: LOANS AND LEASES RESTRUCTURED AND INCLUDED IN PAST DUE AND NONACCRUAL LOANS
description: Includes loans and leases that under their modified terms are past due 30 days or more and still accruing or are in nonaccrual status as of the report date. Such loans and leases are included in items 1406; 1407; or 1403 (items M7.a; M7.b; or M7.c on the report form). description: Includes the number (the actual number ) of loans in the subsidiary's servicing portfolio. COMPARABILITY: Beginning 12/31/02; reported on Schedule BS-M for the FR Y-11 (BHCS) report. Prior to 12/31/02; reported on Schedule A for the FR Y-11I (BHCC) report. NOTE: Reported on the Balance Sheet for the FR Y-11Q (BHCS) report.

item_name: DOLLAR AMOUNT OF LOANS IN SERVICING PORTFOLIO

Included are those loans for which the reporting subsidiary has purchased the servicing rights and those which the reporting subsidiary has originated and sold but for which it has retained servicing. The amounts reported includes loans securitized and sold year-to-date. COMPARABILITY: Beginning 12/31/02; reported on Schedule BS-M for the FR Y-11 (BHCS) report. item_name: PREPAID EXPENSES
description: Includes the amount of all expenses prepaid and applicable as a charge against operations in future periods. COMPARABILITY: Beginning 12/31/02; reported on Schedule BS-M for the FR Y-11 (BHCS) report. Beginning 12/31/02; reported on Schedule BS-M for the FR Y-7N (FNBK) report. Beginning 12/31/02; reported on Schedule BS-M for the FR 2314 (SUBC) report. NOTE: Reported on the Balance Sheet for the FR Y-11Q report.

item_name: NET DEFERRED TAX ASSETS
description: Reported is the cumulative tax effect of all deductible temporary differences; operating loss carryforwards; and tax credit carryforwards in accordance with GAAP. Included is the net amount after offsetting deferred tax assets and net deferred tax liabilities measured at the report date for a particular tax jurisdiction if the net result is a debit balance. Excludes notes with a maturity of more than one year. For series BHSP disclose in this item each component of other assets; and the dollar amount of such component; that exceeds 25 percent of the amount reported on Balance Sheet item 7. For other components of 'other assets' that exceed the disclosure threshol

item_name: EXPENSES ACCRUED AND UNPAID
description: Reported is the amount of interest on deposits; interest on nondeposit liabilities; income taxes; and other expenses accrued through charges to expense during the current or prior periods; but not yet paid. COMPARABILITY: Beginning 12/31/02; reported on the Schedule BS-M for the FR Y-11 (BHCS) report. Beginning 12/31/02; reported on the Schedule BS-M for the FR Y-7N (FNBK) report. item_name: NET DEFERRED TAX LIABILITY

Included is the net amount after offsetting deferred tax assets and net deferred tax liabilities measured at the report date for a particular tax jurisdiction if the net result is a credit balance. item_name: INCOME FROM LOAN SERVICING
description: Includes all income from the servicing of real estate mortgages or other loans held by others that are earned from nonrelated organizations. NOTE: Reported on the Income Statement for the FR Y-11Q report.

item_name: NONINTEREST EXPENSE PERTAINING TO NONRELATED ORGANIZATIONS

Includes all noninterest expense that the reporting subsidiary incurs related to income earned in business transactions with organizations outside of the bank holding company structure (i.e.; third party transactions). Excludes dividends declared during the previous calendar year but paid in the current period.
